name: Anomalous zone challenges
short_description: Steam devlog examples include timed survival, hidden-object digging, vanishing-item collection, passcode fragments, totems, stone buttons, timed rolls, and throwable-object interactions.
notes: Glossary summary is paraphrased from public pages.

name: Anomalous zone hazards
short_description: Steam devlog examples include lightning strikes, roaming tornadoes, fireballs, rolling obsidian spheres, and laser beams.
notes: Glossary summary is paraphrased from public pages.

name: Anomaly zones
short_description: Risk/reward areas that offer challenges and rewards, according to Steam copy.
notes: Glossary summary is paraphrased from public pages.

name: Artifact rarity tiers
short_description: The anomalous-zone devlog lists Common, Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary artifact tiers.
notes: Glossary summary is paraphrased from public pages.

name: Attacks
short_description: The public Steam release-scope wording counts attacks alongside skills, tools, and companions; this wiki currently folds attack-style facts into Skills and Glossary until a standalone attack roster is sourced.
